allow: Bash(node -e "const d = require\('./data/words.json'\); const cats = [...new Set\(d.map\(w=>w.category\)\)]; console.log\('Total words:', d.length\); console.log\('Categories:', cats.join\(', '\)\); console.log\('Entertainment:', d.filter\(w=>w.category==='entertainment'\).length\); console.log\('People:', d.filter\(w=>w.category==='people'\).length\);")
